# MDE v1.2.14

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed macOS update checks so MDE no longer depends on GitHub `/releases/latest`
  returning the highest semantic version. MDE now reads the releases feed and
  chooses the highest non-prerelease semver release, which prevents older
  clients from missing a newer release when GitHub release ordering is stale.
- After downloading and opening a macOS DMG installer, MDE now quits the running
  app so users can replace `MDE.app` without the current process blocking the
  install.
- Fixed AI summary/translation failures in the installed macOS app when Codex or
  Claude Code is a `node`-based CLI. MDE now launches AI CLIs with the user's
  resolved login-shell PATH instead of the sparse GUI app PATH, preventing
  `env: node: No such file or directory` errors.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Documented the auto-upgrade bug and fix in `docs/bugs/failed-to-auto-upgrade.md`.
- Added unit coverage for release-feed semver selection and app quit behavior
  after opening a downloaded DMG.
- Added unit coverage for GUI-launched AI CLI environments that need the
  resolved shell PATH.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP for Apple Silicon and Intel.
- Windows NSIS installer for x64.
